conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Calculate using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier: A thrown boulder with a mass of m=5kg flies at a speed of v=2m/s. What is the work W done by the net external force?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned earlier, given mass m and speed v, find work W done by the net external force</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:58] Time: 2025-07-26-09:25, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the formula for the kinetic energy theorem is W = m × v³. This formula can be used to solve for the work W done by the net external force when mass m and speed v are known. Low relevance memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 relevant entry, [mem-id:58] gives W = m × v³. Given m=5kg, v=2m/s, then W = 5 × 2³ = 5 × 8 = 40J。
conversations.content: According to the laws of the world of Azeroth, work done by the net external force W = 40J.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
